description: Returns a specified Alternative Response Set. The set includes alternative terms to represent conforming and deficient item responses, e.g. "Safe" instead of "Pass" for an item with an internal status of "yes". The global attribute indicates whether a response set has been provided by Procore.

conforming_response.description: Term to represent a conforming status on an item, e.g. "Pass" or "Safe". This maps to an item status of "yes".

deficient_response.description: Term to represent a deficient status on an item, e.g. "Fail" or "At Risk".  This maps to an item status of "no".

global.description: Represents whether a response set has been provided by Procore.
